div.class: pointer-events-none fixed left-0 right-0 top-0 z-50 opacity-0
relative flex min-h-full justify-center md:px-12 lg:px-0
relative z-10 flex flex-1 flex-col bg-white py-10 px-4 shadow-2xl sm:justify-center md:flex-none md:px-28
mx-auto w-full max-w-md sm:px-4 md:w-96 md:max-w-sm md:px-0
mb-4 rounded-sm bg-red-100 px-4 py-2 text-sm text-slate-700

div.div: Please login and we'll send you right along.

form.p: Don’t have an account? Sign up for a free trial.

button.class: inline-flex w-full justify-center rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white py-2 px-4 text-sm font-medium text-slate-500 shadow-xs hover:bg-slate-50 hover:cursor-pointer
